prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** (bolt-on for the **2GR-FKS** 3.5L V6 engine, supporting 400-450whp with a custom **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** and **ID1000x injectors** for precise fueling)
Install a **Tomei 272° camshaft set** (intake/exhaust) with **Ferrea 6000 Series valves** and **Supertech dual valve springs** to optimize airflow for the **2GR-FKS** under forced induction

Replace the stock **6-speed U660E transmission** with a **WPC-treated Aisin 8-speed (UA80)** paired with a **PML Level 2 torque converter** and **RevWorks billet flexplate** for 500+ lb-ft torque capacity
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (custom-fitted for the Venza LE’s unibody, with **carbon fiber overfenders** and **aluminum reinforcement plates** for rigidity)
**Seibon carbon fiber hood** (with **custom dual 40mm venting** to clear the **Garrett GTX3071R** turbo setup and **AIM MXS Strada dash** mounting)

**Work Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +30 wheels** (staggered setup with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** 255/35 front, 275/35 rear) and **D2 Racing coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 8kg/mm front, 9kg/mm rear springs)
